scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build --prefix template/Untitled-Fresh-Out && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('dist/fresh-out')) fs.mkdirSync('dist/fresh-out', {recursive:true}); const fse=require('fs/promises'); async function copy(s, d) { let entries = await fse.readdir(s, {withFileTypes: true}); for (let entry of entries) { let srcPath = require('path').join(s, entry.name); let destPath = require('path').join(d, entry.name); entry.isDirectory() ? (await fse.mkdir(destPath, {recursive: true}), await copy(srcPath, destPath)) : await fse.copyFile(srcPath, destPath); } } copy('template/Untitled-Fresh-Out/dist/public', 'dist/fresh-out').catch(console.error);"
